flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southwest University at El Paso rose 31% between 2008 and 2009 ($6.9k → $9.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southwest University at El Paso fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (88.9% → 63.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southwest University at El Paso fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (61.2% → 51.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Southwest University at El Paso are 0% above 6-year earnings ($29.6k → $29.6k).
